nasb.text: Over the golden altar they shall spread a blue cloth and cover it with a covering of porpoise skin, and shall insert its poles;

esv.text: And over the golden altar they shall spread a cloth of blue and cover it with a covering of goatskin, and shall put in its poles.

cnv.text: 在金壇上面，他們要鋪上藍色布，再蓋上海狗皮罩，然後把槓穿上。

ccb.text: “金香坛上面要盖蓝色布，再盖上海狗皮，穿上抬金香坛的横杠。
